title: <div><tt>10. Jakobsonian Six Functions (dominant function warps all others, phat
content:
10. Jakobsonian Six Functions (dominant function warps all others, phatic as terror, poetic as ontology)

Mandatory Structure (obey precisely):
1. One-sentence axiom — the cruelest possible distillation of this doctrine as world-law.
2. Core Semiotic Mechanism — how signs generate, replicate, and annihilate within this world.
3. Inhabitants-as-Signs — what "consciousness" or "subjects" are in this system (e.g., floating signifiers, interpretants, myths, etc.).
4. Everyday Semiosis — what it "feels" like to exist when every thought is only a sign-function.
5. One original semiographic notation (8–15 symbols or operations specific to this doctrine, with exact function and example).
6. The Aporia Event — the precise moment the theory eats itself and the world ends.
7. Final sign-chain — a 150–250 word text written exclusively in the rules of this doctrine that makes the reader's own language glitch.

Word count: 1100–1500. Be austere, merciless, ecstatic. Never use metaphors that imply materiality or psychology — only the violence of the sign.
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 13 (chunk 13/18)
